# Fraser Policy Perception Index extraction

The accompanying CSV transcribes the study-country rows from Table 2 (Policy Perception Index) in the Fraser Institute annual mining surveys. The 2024 report supplies 2020--2024 values; the 2023 report supplies the additional 2019 values. Missing values shown as `**` in the reports are not imputed.

- 2024 report, Table 2, pp. 18--20: https://www.fraserinstitute.org/sites/default/files/2025-07/annual-survey-of-mining-companies-2024_0.pdf
- 2023 report, Table 2, pp. 18--20: https://www.fraserinstitute.org/sites/default/files/2023-annual-survey-of-mining-companies.pdf

Nigeria and Sierra Leone have no reported PPI observations in these tables. Coverage varies because jurisdictions require a minimum number of survey responses. The panel is therefore used for mining-specific convergent validation with country-clustered resampling, not as a balanced population panel, causal outcome, or source for threshold labels.
